title: Feature request : Pasting image in file column
excerpt:
Hi, 
It would be very useful to add image in file column by pasting. 
When you add screenshots for example, it will avoid to save the screenshot on the disk and then select in the column file. 
Thanks, 
Jean-Noé

posts.author: jncoulon (Coulon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

It would be very useful to add image in file column by pasting.
When you add screenshots for example, it will avoid to save the screenshot on the disk and then select in the column file.

Thanks,

Jean-Noé

posts.author: awmajcherk (Adam Majcherkiewicz)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see this feature added! It’s super simple in TRELLO to do so, and it’s a talking point in adopting MONDAY Full time, by our team. We screenshot many things through production, and this is a hassle.

posts.author: OmarConte (Omar Conte)
posts.cookedHtml: ClickUp does it super well. I can’t imagine why Monday doesn’t do it.
